examples: The word lunacy, meaning "madness", is derived from Luna, the Latin name for the Roman goddess of the moon.
Thousands of people kissed simultaneously in the Plaza de la Luna of downtown Madrid at 8 pm Thursday night.
Luna 16 landed on the lunar surface (in total darkness, no less), collected moon rocks, packed them up, and returned them to Earth.
For months my toilet was surrounded by Latina sitters staring at Luna, waiting for poo.
"We still have to go once or twice" a month, "which is OK, " said Mr. Luna.
